notes: lockfile_format: All packages carry integrity sha512 hashes (new in 11.9 for on-demand registries).
checksum_signing: .npmrc sets verify-store-integrity=true — exercises ERR_PNPM_MISSING_TARBALL_INTEGRITY enforcement.

tree_structure: Snapshot keys use deterministic peer-suffix form e.g. react-dom@18.3.1(react@18.3.1). PnpmParserV9Impl must strip parenthesised suffixes to recover bare version '18.3.1' — regression detector.
